productDisplayName: Fusion Beats Women White Printed Tunic
description: Style Note We like the range of bright and colourful tunics, kurtas and kurtis that comes our way from fusion beats. They can be easily styled and never fail to catch hold of the latest fashion trends. Pair these with solid leggings and strappy flats for an ethnic look with a twist. Product Details White printed tunic, has a round neckline with trims around it, cap sleeves and a panel at the hemline Material and Care Blended Hand wash cold Do not iron on decorations Size Regular Fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
